content.en:
"Silent Black Sea, finally stepping into this area again!"

Wuwu sighed.

Immediately, he issued an order: "Let these primordial artifacts invade the boundaries of the Silent Black Sea, and by the way, control the countless primordial artifacts of the Silent Black Sea to attack together, and then awaken the sleeping primordial artifacts and disturb the entire Silent Black Sea." As for us avatar-level, the five top powers that directly invaded the Silent Black Sea. "

And the top big force chosen by Wuwu is Shidao Mountain.

The reason why Shidaoshan was chosen was because the strength of Shidaoshan was almost concentrated in the headquarters, and Shidaoshan suffered heavy losses during the confluence last time, and now it is the weakest.

Airplanes!!!!

A large number of chemical level followed this group of enhanced material level to the Ten Dao Mountains.

......

Ten Mountains.

When many chemical levels came here, the Supreme Nine Ancestors of the Ten Dao Mountains naturally knew.

Immediately, the Ten Dao Mountains opened a large defensive array, and a dense large array opened, covering the surrounding regional boundaries.

Seeing so many large arrays, Wuwu smiled contemptuously, not caring at all.

"Attack!"

A group of supreme enhancement and a large number of chemical level led by Wu Wu shot out in unison, bombarding this large array, instantly tearing apart one large array after another.

At this rate, these large arrays would not be able to protect the Ten Mountains for long.

At this time, the first mountain master of the Ten Dao Mountains, the Wild Thunder Dao Ancestor, was very nervous, if there were so many supreme enhancement and transformation level in the outside world, if they really entered the Ten Dao Mountains.

Then, the countless disciples of the Ten Dao Mountains would all be killed, and even they, the Supreme Nine Ancestors, would not be able to bear it for long, and they would be killed one by one.

"Hurry up and ask for help from the Nine Towers, the Demon Sea, the Secret Realm, and the Divine Blood Sect, and let them go all out to support our Ten Mountains, otherwise our Ten Mountains will be destroyed, and they will also be destroyed one by one. "

Wild Thunder Dao Ancestor said.

At the same time, the forces such as the Nine Towers naturally knew that the Primordial Ancient Sea had invaded the Ten Dao Mountains, and they naturally did not allow the Ten Dao Mountains to be destroyed.

As a result, a group of Supreme Ninefold Ancestors and a large number of Ninefold Ancestors went to the Ten Dao Mountains.

Among them, Ye Tian also came.

Just in the Xuanle Territory, a large regional boundary not far from the Ten Dao Mountains, the combined army of many forces encountered the transformation level of the major tribes of the Primordial Ancient Sea.

At the same time, the supreme enhancement level of the Ten Dao Mountains also appeared.

At this time, no force can be left alone, and must gamble on everything that intercepts these supreme enhancement levels of the Primordial Ancient Sea.

"Hahaha, it's all here, then kill you all, and the Silent Black Sea will belong to our Primordial Ancient Sea!"

Wuwu said excitedly.

Abrupt.

He found that there was one missing Supreme Ninefold Ancestor.

"Hey, that old guy from the Demon Bone Dao Ancestor isn't there? Could it be that he is impacting the realm of the mid-level immeasurable life form?"

Wuwu guessed.

Many of the Supreme Nine Ancestors did not answer, but it was also true.

They didn't feel that they could rely on these Ninefold Primordial Ancestors to compete with the Primordial Ancient Sea, so they still pinned their hopes on the Demon Bone Dao Ancestor who was most likely to break through to the mid-level immeasurable lifeforms.

And the Demon Bone Dao Ancestor is also the strongest in the Demon Sea, and he is in retreat in a hidden place at the moment.

If the Demon Bone Dao Ancestor breaks through, then the crisis will naturally be resolved.

"Kill them, and then go find the old guy with the demon bones!"

Fog Wu ordered.

In an instant, the battle broke out.

Then.

A supreme enhancement level stared at Ye Tian, this supreme enhancement level is very weak, and it also belongs to a supreme enhancement level that has just broken through, and the attack power is only dozens of immeasurable scales.

"Die!"

Ye Tian made a move, and he didn't even use the Great Perfection Level Infinite Dao Control Technique, he only used the most basic strength plus the Infinite Body.

Just like that, it is possible to erupt with hundreds of immeasurable scale attacks.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian burst this supreme strength level with one punch, and just when the opponent's body was about to condense, he pinched the opponent's body with one hand and pinched it fiercely.

In an instant, this Supreme Enhancement Rank was completely annihilated.

A punch, a pinch, a supreme enhancement level fell, and it didn't seem to be much forced.

This scene was noticed by the other supreme enhancement levels, and their expressions suddenly changed drastically.

You must know that it is not easy to be killed at the level of reinforcement, let alone the primordial ancients who are characterized by their fast recovery power.

But now, he was almost killed by Ye Tian in seconds!

Just when they were stunned, Ye Tian instantly killed another supreme strengthener.

Seeing this scene, where are these supreme strengths still not clear about Ye Tian's strength, far surpassing other supreme nine ancestors!

"He, I'll deal with it!"

The sound of foggy black reverberated across the battlefield.

The next moment, Wuwu came to Ye Tian and intercepted Ye Tian.

"There is still a demon like you among the primary-level immeasurable lifeforms, but you are only a primary-level immeasurable lifeform, not my opponent!"

Wuwu said coldly.

Ye Tian was too lazy to talk nonsense with Wuwu, so he shot directly.

And this time, Ye Tian didn't hide his strength, and directly broke out his peak combat power.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian collided with Wuwu.

In the eyes of those Supreme Ninefold Origin Ancestors or Supreme Enhancement Matter Level, Ye Tian was afraid that he would be directly knocked away, but what he didn't expect was that it was Wu Wu who was knocked away.

In a flash.

A golden spear tore through the endless darkness and directly nailed the fog black into the depths of time and space.

Rumble!!!!

The power of the fog black erupted, breaking free from the endless golden spear, and the blood was drenched all over his body. The injuries were not minor.

"How can you be so powerful???"

Wu Wu was confused.

He is a mid-level immeasurable life form, and Ye Tian is only a nominary-level immeasurable life form, why is it he who is crushed by him!

It was as if Ye Tian was a middle-level immeasurable lifeform, and he was a first-level immeasurable lifeform.

"Run!"

The Fog Crow didn't want to invade the Silent Black Sea, so all the avatar levels fled back to the Primordial Ancient Sea.

However.

"Endless Golden Spear!"

Dense golden spears appeared, bombarding a supreme enhancement level in this territory.

Although each golden spear contained not much power, the weaker Supreme Strengthener Rank was still severely damaged by a spear, and then attacked by those Supreme Nine Primordial Ancestors on the Silent Black Sea.

Gradually, a supreme enhancement level fell.

As for Wuwu, he was trying to escape with all his strength at the moment, trying to escape from here, but Ye Tian kept chasing and killing.

In terms of speed, Ye Tian is about the same as Wuwu, or even a little worse, and can only interfere with Wuwu by constantly attacking.

Gradually, Kiriwu's injuries became more and more serious.

Not long after, the Fog Crow passed through the passage between the Silent Black Sea and the Primordial Ancient Sea, and returned to the Primordial Ancient Sea.

And Ye Tian continued to enter the Primordial Ancient Sea, and it wasn't until a long time later that he came back from the Primordial Ancient Sea.
